alpha.desc: The alpha view shows the front approach to the residence|The driveway, parking area, and primary entry courtyard are visible, with mature trees providing screening around portions of the home.

bravo.desc: The bravo view shows the western portion of the property|The sport court, lawn areas, pergola, and outdoor recreation spaces are visible adjacent to the residence.

charlie.desc: The charlie view shows the eastern side of the residence and driveway area|Native vegetation surrounds the developed portions of the property, with maintained landscaping concentrated near the structure.

delta.desc: The delta view shows the southern side of the residence and entry drive|Trees and landscaping provide separation between the home and the surrounding open terrain.

nadir.desc: The nadir view shows the residence centered within a landscaped area surrounded by native vegetation|A detached sport court is located west of the home, while a pergola and outdoor gathering area are situated to the northwest|A curved driveway provides access from the roadway to the residence.
